alarms.name: RAT SP Changing by more than 5 degrees
The Number of Running Motors is less than Demanded

eventScripts.script:
def updateEnable(startMotor, endMotor, doEanble):
		if startMotor < 10 and endMotor < 10:
			for x in range(startMotor+1, endMotor+1):
				base_path='/'.join(tagPath.split('/')[:-1])
				base_list=[
				base_path + "/MTR_Cfg_Prio_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/MTR_Val_Rank_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorAvail_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorRunning_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStarting_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStopped_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStopping_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled"
				]
				system.tag.writeAsync(base_list,[doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble])
		elif startMotor < 10 and endMotor >= 10:
			for x in range(startMotor+1, 10):
				base_path='/'.join(tagPath.split('/')[:-1])
				base_list=[
				base_path + "/MTR_Cfg_Prio_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/MTR_Val_Rank_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorAvail_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorRunning_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStarting_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStopped_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStopping_0" + str(x) + ".Enabled"
				]
				system.tag.writeAsync(base_list,[doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble])
			for x in range(10, endMotor+1):
				base_path='/'.join(tagPath.split('/')[:-1])
				base_list=[
				base_path + "/MTR_Cfg_Prio_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/MTR_Val_Rank_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorAvail_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorRunning_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStarting_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStopped_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStopping_" + str(x) + ".Enabled"
				]
				system.tag.writeAsync(base_list,[doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble])
		else:
			for x in range(startMotor+1, endMotor+1):
				base_path='/'.join(tagPath.split('/')[:-1])
				base_list=[
				base_path + "/MTR_Cfg_Prio_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/MTR_Val_Rank_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorAvail_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorRunning_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStarting_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStopped_" + str(x) + ".Enabled",
				base_path + "/Sts_MotorStopping_" + str(x) + ".Enabled"
				]
				system.tag.writeAsync(base_list,[doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble, doEanble])
				
	if initialChange:
		updateEnable(0,currentValue.value,True)
	elif previousValue.value < currentValue.value:
		updateEnable(previousValue.value,currentValue.value,True)
	elif initialChange or previousValue.value > currentValue.value:
		updateEnable(currentValue.value,previousValue.value, False)
